title: Destructive Temperatures
description: Makes Destroy pollution affect Cold Sweat temperature
body:
Quick and dirty mod that adds a [Cold Sweat](https://modrinth.com/mod/cold-sweat) [TempModifier](https://mikul.gitbook.io/cold-sweat/tempmodifiers) for ozone depletion & greenhouse gas pollution from [Destroy](https://modrinth.com/mod/destroy), increasing global temperatures in worlds affected by pollution. At max pollution levels, the temperature in desert biomes can reach 140°F+.

Support not guaranteed, I made this for a modpack I'm putting together for some friends.

Feel free to use for your own modpacks.

v1.1.0 is for Cold Sweat 2.3+ \
v1.0.0 is for Cold Sweat 2.2.5.1
